rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BRIAN ANDREW SCULLY
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following procedural issues still remain: 1) Notice of Hearing (Form DE-120) is required for this proceeding and Box 1 must be checked (Probate Code Section 12201). 2) All notices must include language about remote appearances. (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6) Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JANES H. SMITH LIVING TRUST DATED APRIL 27, TRUST 2002
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Validity Of Service Under Probate Code Section 16061.7 And Extension Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/22/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (2) The address of the successor trustee is shown to be in San Carlos, which is not in this county. (3) Lillian Thompson is missing from the list of beneficiaries. (4) Who are the persons listed in paragraph 33 of the petition? (How are they interested parties?) (5) How is the petitioner a member of the class of issue of Trustor's children? The children and their issue are contingent remainder beneficiaries; the wife is entitled to distribution of income and principal as she deems advisable for her health, education, maintenance, and support. (6) If the whereabouts of an interested party (James Anthony Smith) are unknown, an ex parte petition must be filed to dispense with notice to such person. [CRC 7.52.] If this is indeed the proper venue, please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 9/8/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JANET LYNN MACRITCHIE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the mailed and published notice should have indicated that the PETITION was amended, not that the notice was amended, and a verified supplement should have been filed to indicate that one of the heirs had a different address from the one shown in amended petition. Status of closing the estate will be set for 7/13/26. The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before 7/13/26. Appearance will be required on that status date if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD W. NARSAVICH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/25/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The DATE OF DEATH of the purportedly pre-deceased siblings, Kenneth Cotter and Walter Cotter, were not set forth, as required by LRSF 14.18 D.1.] (2) The wife and children of a post-deceased heir are not necessarily the post-deceased heir's successors-in-interest. [LRSF 14.18 D.3.] If a courtesy copy of the second supplement to the petition, addressing these issues, is received by the assigned examiner by 8/12/25, the petition could be pre-granted for 8/25/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Item 3d(2) of the petition is for the estimated annual INCOME from real or personal property.)
